ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  Aditya Birla Real Estate Limited has announced its 129th Annual General Meeting (AGM) to be held virtually on July 27, 2026, and proposes a dividend of Rs. 2.50 per equity share for FY2025-26, with a payout date on or after July 30, 2026 if approved. The company is primarily distributing the Integrated Annual Report and AGM Notice digitally, but is also sending physical letters containing web-links and QR codes to shareholders who have not registered their email addresses to ensure regulatory compliance and information access. Shareholders are encouraged to register their emails and ensure KYC compliance for timely dividend receipt; no immediate red flags are identified, as this is a standard corporate governance disclosure.
